title: Forged Carpet
description: Powerful toolbox with ultimate control for technical mc!
body:
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DeadlyMC/forged-carpet/master/media/forged-carpet-cf.png)

Forged carpet is a port of the carpet-mod to forge! Carpet-mod is a modular mod with the aim to enhance your vanilla survival experience by adding awesome new features, bug fixes and more! It also adds awesome features for creative testing your farms.
>
All features can be controlled using the /carpet command. (Only accessible by ops)
>
**There are no plans to update this to modern versions of the game, make use of fabric-carpet instead.**
>
Contact me on discord: DeadlyMC#9052
